# Hire1Percent

> AI-powered recruitment and interview platform.

Hire1Percent helps recruiters automate candidate screening,
AI interviews, resume analysis, and hiring workflows.

## Main Features

- AI Interviews
- Candidate Scoring
- Resume Screening
- Recruiter Dashboard
- Automated Hiring Workflow

## Pages

- https://hire1percent.com
- https://hire1percent.com/jobs
- https://hire1percent.com/interview

## Technology Stack

- React
- Node.js
- PostgreSQL
- OpenAI
- Vapi AI
